en.text: from G0206 and probably a modified form of πόσθη (the penis or male sexual organ); the prepuce; by implication, an uncircumcised (i.e. gentile, figuratively, unregenerate) state or person

senses.gloss_en: from G0206 and probably a modified form of πόσθη (the penis or male sexual organ); the prepuce; by implication, an uncircumcised (i.e. gentile, figuratively, unregenerate) state or person
